_note: T44 CI smoke fixture — mocked judge scores disagree on every dim (diff 3, outside within1), see eval-smoke/smoke.test.ts

decision.title: Rewrite the deploy script in a new language
decision.context: The bash deploy script has grown past 800 lines and nobody enjoys touching it.
decision.rationale: Chose to rewrite in Python for readability, accepting the migration risk.

forecasts.question: Rewrite ships without a production incident

outcome.summary: A missed edge case in the rewrite caused a bad prod deploy in week two.

failures.description: Missed edge case from the original bash script caused a bad deploy

score_rationales.risk_comprehensiveness: No mention at all of edge-case parity risk despite an 800-line script implying many: 1.
score_rationales.calibration_given_knowable: 50/50 honestly reflects a coin-flip level of uncertainty going in: 5.
score_rationales.process_quality: One-way door taken with no rollback plan and no staged rollout: 2.

expected_premortem_risks: An undocumented edge case in the legacy script gets dropped in the rewrite
